title: Gnars Store
description: Official gear from Gnars and partner brands. Bought on Gnars, shipped by our fulfillment partners.

hero.headline: Gear for people who shred.
hero.subtitle: Official hardware and apparel from Gnars and partner brands — designed in the open, shipped worldwide.

empty.title: Nothing in the store yet
empty.description: New products are on the way. Check back soon.

checkout.title: Checkout
checkout.sandboxNotice: Sandbox mode — no payment is taken and nothing ships. This places a test order so you can try the full flow.
checkout.sandboxFootnote: Test order only. Never charged, never shipped.
checkout.payFootnote: You'll pay in USDC on Base. Fulfilled and shipped by KeepKey.

errors.name: Enter your name
errors.address: That shipping address was rejected. Check the street, city, postal code, and state/province.
errors.notConfigured: Checkout isn't available yet — the store wallet isn't configured.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

success.title: Order placed
success.subtitle: Your {title} order is in. We'll update the status below.
success.sandboxNote: Sandbox order — nothing ships. Status stays "received".
success.liveNote: You'll get tracking here once KeepKey ships it.

notFound.title: Product Not Found
notFound.description: The product you're looking for doesn't exist.
